source: local Domain Intelligence Engine only (pattern matched: Request-Approval Workflow)

domainAwarePages.pagePurpose: Primary workspace for managing Leave Management end to end - covers the full Request-Approval Workflow lifecycle.
validations: fromDate must be before or equal to toDate
requested amount must not exceed remaining balance/eligibility
overlapping leave requests for the same requester are not allowed
attachment required when leave type requires supporting evidence
weekend/holiday exclusion rule applies when calculating requested days/units
approver cannot approve their own request
requests cannot be submitted past the configured cutoff window
navigation: Detail drawer opens from list row click
Back to list from detail view
domainAwarePages.emptyState: No Leave records yet - show a "Create Leave" call to action.
domainAwarePages.loadingState: Skeleton rows while Leave list is fetched.
domainAwarePages.errorState: Inline error banner with retry if Leave list/detail fails to load.
permissionRules: Requester can view/act according to the Request-Approval Workflow role matrix - see requirement-scope.json for per-step authorization.
Approver can view/act according to the Request-Approval Workflow role matrix - see requirement-scope.json for per-step authorization.
Admin can view/act according to the Request-Approval Workflow role matrix - see requirement-scope.json for per-step authorization.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Apply (Leave Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Requester can perform "Apply" only when business rules and validations for Leave are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Validate Balance/Eligibility (Leave Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: System can perform "Validate Balance/Eligibility" only when business rules and validations for Leave are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Submit (Leave Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Requester can perform "Submit" only when business rules and validations for Leave are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Manager Review (Leave Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Approver can perform "Manager Review" only when business rules and validations for Leave are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Approve (Leave Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Approver can perform "Approve" only when business rules and validations for Leave are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Reject (Leave Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Approver can perform "Reject" only when business rules and validations for Leave are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Cancel (Leave Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Requester can perform "Cancel" only when business rules and validations for Leave are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Notify Requester (Leave Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: System can perform "Notify Requester" only when business rules and validations for Leave are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Sync Downstream Impact (Leave Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: System can perform "Sync Downstream Impact" only when business rules and validations for Leave are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Generate Report (Leave Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Admin can perform "Generate Report" only when business rules and validations for Leave are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

note: 10 domain-aware requirements/pages below define actual Leave Management business behavior (Request-Approval Workflow pattern) - the generic page list above only covers page-level CRUD scaffolding from the platform's own requirements. Implement both sets.
